allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "d:\\xampp\\htdocs\\kltheguide.com.my - backup\\assets\\css\\main.css" -Raw; $matches4 = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'url\\\([^\\\)]+\\\)'\); Write-Output "Total URL references: $\($matches4.Count\)"; $matches4 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Where-Object { $_ -match 'img/' -and $_ -notmatch 'vendor|icon|logo|adsbygoogle|fancybox' } | Select-Object -Unique)
